title: Kerala Rain & Heat Alert: Several Districts in Kerala to Experience Rainfall & Heat at the same time - NativePlanet
search_term: ("heat advisory" OR "heat action plan" OR "heat alert" OR "IMD warning" OR "IMD alert" OR "red alert" OR "orange alert" OR "yellow alert" OR "NDMA advisory" OR "cooling shelter" OR "relief measures" OR "heat compensation" OR "severe weather warning") Kerala
full_text:
Light to moderate rain occurred in Idukki & Ernakulam on Sunday evening, bringing relief to people, helping reduce the intense summer heat. The showers, along with cool breezes and windy conditions, gave residents a short break from the rising temperatures that had been troubling the state.
Kerala Rain & Heat Alert
However, the India Meteorological Department (IMD) has warned that this relief may not last long. The department has issued both rain and heat alerts for several districts in Kerala, indicating changing weather conditions in the coming days.
Light to Moderate Rain & Strong Winds
IMD has said that thunderstorms with light to moderate rain and strong winds of up to 40 kmph may occur in isolated areas, including Idukki, Ernakulam, and Wayanad, for the next few hours, and people are advised to remain cautious as the weather can change suddenly.
List of Districts to Receive Rainfall in Kerala
Rainfall is expected to continue across the state till April 23. From April 19 to 21, most districts, including Thiruvananthapuram, Kollam, Kottayam, Ernakulam, Kozhikode, and others, are likely to receive light to moderate rain. On April 22 and 23, rain may continue mainly in southern and central districts, including Thiruvananthapuram, Kollam, Kottayam, Ernakulam, and Idukki.
List of Districts to Experience a Rise in Temperatures
At the same time, IMD has also issued a heat warning. Temperatures may reach up to 40°C in Palakkad, around 39°C in Kollam, and about 38°C in Kottayam. Many other districts may see temperatures between 36°C and 37°C, which is higher than normal.
Even though evening rain may cool things slightly, hot and humid conditions are expected to continue during the day, making the weather uncomfortable.
